title: Formula needed to get "State" from address
excerpt:
I have an Address field in a board. I’m able to extract the street number, street name, city name, country, etc. through formula columns (e.g. {Address#CityShort}, {Address#StreetNumber}, {Address#StreetShort}) 
However,…

posts.author: mweekend (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an Address field in a board. I’m able to extract the street number, street name, city name, country, etc. through formula columns (e.g. {Address#CityShort}, {Address#StreetNumber}, {Address#StreetShort})

However, there is no option for “State”. I’d expect something like {Address#State} but it is missing. I’ve tried some complicated formulas to try to extract the state but without luck. Are there any suggestions to get the 2-digit state based on the address field?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you have AI turned on your account? Could you use a text column with AI to extract that info?

posts.author: VanessaValle (Vanessa)
posts.cookedHtml: 1. This is actually what I’m doing. I’m using the “location” type column and the AI extract capability to extract the street, city, state, postal code, and country from the location.
